content_body: My wife and I booked the home for the privacy and the location. We live in Miami and just wanted to get away for a week. We did not need a home that sleeps 6, but we booked the Hidden Valley lodge based on the looks of the cabin, description and the location. The home is only 10 minutes from Ellijay and 20 minutes from Blue Ridge. We planned on cooking most of our dinners at the cabin so most of our time was spent there except for a couple of meals in Ellijay and Blue Ridge. We thoroughly enjoyed sitting on the back deck at night with a fire going. The fire place in the living room also got used every night. The cabin was easy to get there and you do not need a 4-wheel drive vehicle to get up the hill. There is a creek within walking distance from the cabin which became a good destination for one of our many morning walks. The kitchen had everything you need for meals at home and the bed was very comfortable. For those that want to watch tv, there are plenty of channels to watch. Besides the morning news, the TV was rarely used. Should we visit the area again in the future we would definitely stay at the Hidden Valley Lodge.
title: Home had everything we expected and more.
